infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Pulse uses your location to track runs and map routes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Pulse uses your location to track runs in the background.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Pulse reads your health data to track workout progress.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Pulse saves workouts and activity data to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Pulse uses motion data for workout tracking.
